message:
feat(tui): add external link hints to Insights footer and Tab/search controls

Extends the Insights mode footer to show:
- Tab focus and / search controls (always visible)
- o open link / y copy link (when selected issue has external_ref)

Matches the Board mode footer pattern for consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
